subject: Remove unneeded node port 32208
commit_message:
Remove unneeded node port 32208

Remove unneeded node port 32208 to resolve issue identified with ssh
port detected.

Change-Id: Ibcbfd0621c2950a2ea3f429f8beb38d03e1910d3
Issue-ID: OJSI-183
Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 5 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2674/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2674

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Node port 32208 (maps to the karaf client interface,  which there is no need to expose as a node port.  Verified in CCSDK windriver env that removing this node port does no harm.
Uploaded patch set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 6 on the queue.

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2676/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2676
Change has been successfully merged by Alexis de Talhouët
